labels: Mild to moderate left pleural effusion is decreased in size from the prior exam has as is adjacent left basal atelectasis. No evidence of pneumothorax.
report:
FINDINGS: Mild to moderate cardiomegaly is stable from the prior examination. There has been an interval decrease in adjacent left basal atelectasis. The right lung is clear. No evidence of pneumothorax. Marked thoracolumbar dextroscoliosis is unchanged.
IMPRESSION: Mild to moderate left pleural effusion is decreased in size from the prior exam has as is adjacent left basal atelectasis. No evidence of pneumothorax.
